{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320154717E640DC143ED9422B8A84"}"},"total":53},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7580574568046789400","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还不错的一本书，是本正能量的书，感觉就是有点太慈善了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764993676,"group_id":"7572507034034129944","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2Q84eG4/2x0OBoMiPM58R7lFDDHkJVBV0v0SKAJe+Dr","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533184&x-signature=RgoLQBEbWHhse2wGyPFgozOziRs%3D","user_id":"1783851344474452","user_name":"信了你的邪"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1783851344474452","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7572507034034129944","book_info":{"abstract":"何晨轩重生到特种兵世界，获得最强教官系统。
系统功能单一，效果逆天，只要何晨轩手下的特种兵，其所有能力就能反哺百分之一到宿主。
手下的特种兵数量越多，实力越强，何晨轩自身的实力也就越强。
只是.....
王艳兵：“这个幽灵特种大队，怎么从来没听过？”
李二牛：“俺们不是参加狼牙的选拔吗？怎么变成幽灵特种大队的选拔？”
叶寸心：“我们不是参加女子特战队的选拔吗？怎么还有男兵？”
田果：“哇~，这个教官好帅啊？”
何晨光：“这次特种兵选拔，我们有的受了。”
